question: Which statement best describes the site visits trend shown in the chart from 2018 to 2022?

options.A: Site visits peaked in 2020 and then declined afterward.
options.B: We cannot determine whether 2021 or 2022 has more visits because their bars are clipped at the top.
options.C: Site visits increased every year from 2018 through 2022.
options.D: Site visits in 2021 and 2022 were exactly the same.

explanation: The visible y-range is set below the maximum value, so the top bars are truncated and looks identical.
